title: CUBIMANA Friends Girls House Building Set with LED Light - Pink Girl Villa Building Block with Car and Pool, 1317PCS Friends House Toy for Role Play, Christmas Birthday Gift for Girls Boys Age 6-14+
features: COLORFUL GIRL VILLA PLAYSET – The CUBIMANA Girl House Building Block Set is a vibrant and beautifully designed playhouse that inspires endless creativity. Its bright walls are decorated with blooming flowers, creating a cheerful and welcoming atmosphere. The set includes a garden, a heart-shaped pool with a slide, a stylish pink car, a barbecue grill, and adorable pet companions. With so many exciting details, kids can enjoy hours of fun building and storytelling as they create their own lively home

ENCHANTING LIGHT-UP DESIGN – This girl house building set comes with a string of lights that transforms the villa into a warm and cozy home when night falls. The lights can be installed following the guide or arranged freely for a personalized touch. When illuminated, the soft glow brings every detail of the villa to life, adding charm and creating a magical atmosphere that inspires kids to imagine heartwarming stories inside their very own house

4 FLOORS OF FUN – With four unique levels, this villa offers endless play opportunities. The first floor features a garage and an art studio for creativity, the second floor has a dining room and kitchen, the third floor hosts a music room with a piano and drums, and the fourth floor includes a cozy bedroom. Two openable roofs and quick disassembly make it easy for kids to access every room. This thoughtful design encourages imaginative play and lets kids fully explore their villa world

SAFE & HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS – Crafted from premium, non-toxic ABS materials, this girl house set is designed with both durability and safety in mind. Each piece is sturdy, smooth-edged, and connects securely for a reliable building experience. The set also includes a step-by-step, full-color instruction manual that helps children build confidently on their own. Perfect for kids aged 8–12, it provides peace of mind for parents while delivering hours of creative playtime for kids

PERFECT HOLIDAY OR BIRTHDAY GIFT – Whether it’s for Christmas, birthdays, or any special occasion, this colorful and detailed villa set makes a thoughtful and exciting gift. Packed with charming features and opportunities for role-play, it immediately captures kids’ attention and keeps them engaged in storytelling fun. More than just a toy, it fosters creativity, teamwork, and imaginative play. An ideal choice for both girls and boys, it brings joy and memorable moments to every family gathering
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Everyone may imagine stepping into his or her very own grand house. The CUBIMANA Girl House Building Set makes that dream real. With colorful design and rich details, kids can role-play and create memorable moments. Even grown-ups will feel the charm of building the house they once wished for. What's better, friends and family can join in the fun - each person building their own floor, then combining everything together to enjoy the shared joy of completing the set. Enchanting Light-Up Effect In daylight, the CUBIMANA Girl House building toy shines with vibrant colors and intricate details. Each floor is filled with lively scenes, making it a beautiful playhouse even without the lights on. When the lights glow softly at night, the Friends House transforms into a warm, cozy villa. The gentle illumination adds magic, turning every playtime into an enchanting and joyful experience. Whether it’s a birthday, Christmas, or any festive holiday, the CUBIMANA Girl House Building Set makes an unforgettable gift. Suitable for kids boys girls ages 8–12+ as well as adults, this colorful and detailed girls villa set inspires creativity, storytelling, and hours of joyful building fun.
